backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Inside Pet Tech app, defining Article, UserProfile, and NewsletterSubscription types with CRUD operations, access-controlled admin functions, and blob storage/authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the 'News & Views' category section was added to the homepage to display all four category sections with consistent layout and styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes in each component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, brand, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Inside Pet Tech', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the Vite entry module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with public routes (home, category, article, about, contact) and admin routes (dashboard, new/edit article), wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/articles/Article: Reusable article card component with three display variants (default, compact, featured) using TanStack Router Links with static paths and params for type-safe navigation.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup, collecting name and bio fields and submitting via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation, blocking dismissal until complete.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with newsletter signup, category links, company links, and a copyright bar using TanStack Router Links.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Renders the sticky top navigation bar with category links, logo, mobile menu toggle, and admin/sign-out controls for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Displays a newsletter subscription form with email validation that calls the useSubscribeToNewsletter mutation and shows toast feedback on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposed via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for reading and mutating backend data, including articles, categories, user profiles, admin checks, and newsletter subscriptions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark editorial color themes using OKLCH, and adds brand gradient and shadow utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger (cn), date formatters, and lookup maps for category labels/slugs/descriptors, content type labels, status labels, and gradient classes, plus slugify and ID generation helpers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page describing Inside Pet Tech's mission, target audience segments, and editorial coverage pillars, rendered with a hero section, mission copy, and grid layouts.
Admin dashboard page showing a table of all articles with actions to edit, publish, archive, and delete each article, using status badges and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLayout.tsx: Layout wrapper for admin pages that handles Internet Identity authentication, admin privilege verification, and renders a sidebar nav with logout; shows appropriate states for unauthenticated or non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ArticleEditor.t: Form-based editor for creating or editing articles, supporting fields like title, slug, category, content type, body, and featured flag, with auto-slug generation on create and navigation back to the dashboard on save.
frontend/src/pages/ArticleDetailPage.tsx: Article detail page that looks up a published article by slug, renders its full content with metadata and a thumbnail/video, and shows up to three related articles from the same category.
frontend/src/pages/CategoryPage.tsx: Category listing page that resolves a URL slug to a Category enum, fetches and displays sorted published articles in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with a client-side-only form (name, email, subject, message) that validates inputs, shows inline errors, and displays a success state on submission without backend persistence.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main public-facing home page that displays a featured hero article, a grid of published articles, and category spotlights, with skeleton loading states for each section.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), oklch-based color tokens, editorial box shadows, brand colors, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 13) describing 'Inside Pet Tech', a pet tech news site modeled after Retail Dive, including architectural notes, known issues (missing nav links, missing News & Views section), and a list of existing implemented features.
